{{CargoOrgan
|name=Golden Abs
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10809
|idx=10
|description=Do you want to get V-cut abs without doing exercises? Just transplant these perfect abs!
|skill=
|hp=1312
|def=123
|atk=73
|rush=90
|gene1=Per 20 Wonder Fungi eaten, {race} DEF +10
Wonder Fungi used: 60/60
|gene2=Wind RES +30
|gene3=In Snail Arena, {race} DEF +20
|gene7=Wind RES +90 (Awakened)
|}}
